zh.lifeSummary: 當George Neville於大約1418年出生在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾拉內拉爾時，他的父親William de Neville29歲，母親Elizabeth Baker25歲。他於大約1441年與Isabel Mabel Croftes在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾拉內拉爾結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和2個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当George Neville于大约1418年出生在英国英格兰諾廷加姆爾拉內拉爾时，他的父亲William de Neville29岁，母亲Elizabeth Baker25岁。他于大约1441年与Isabel Mabel Croftes在英国英格兰諾廷加姆爾拉內拉爾结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和2个女儿的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Neville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Neuville in Calvados or Néville in Seine-Maritime, both so called from Old French neu(f) ‘new’ (from Latin novus) + ville ‘settlement’. One family line, originally from Neuville (Calvados), became powerful during the Wars of the Roses through Richard Neville (1428–71), 16th Earl of Warwick, nicknamed "The Kingmaker".
Irish (Munster): assimilation of the Gaelic name Ó Niadh (see Nee ) and sometimes of Ó Cnaimhín (see Nevin ).

History: George Neville came to VA in or c. 1700 and settled on the headwaters of the Occoquan River, acquiring a large estate. His descendants, bearing the surnames Neville and Craig, were of considerable importance in Pittsburgh, PA, and Cincinnati, OH.

meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of Neville , with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Nevels
meanings: English and Scottish (Wigtownshire): of Norman origin, a variant of Neville , with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is now rare in Britain.
Dutch and North German: unexplained.

variants.name: Nee
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Dermot, John Patrick.

Irish (Galway): shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Niadh ‘descendant of Nia’ or Mac Niadh ‘son of Nia’. Compare McNee . Needham 2 and Neville have also been adopted as Anglicized forms of this name.
North German: possibly a relationship name from Middle Low German neve ‘nephew, grand-child’.

nameMeanings.name: George
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Via Old French and Latin, from Greek Georgios (a derivative of geōrgos ‘farmer’, from gē ‘earth’ + ergein ‘to work’). This was the name of several early saints, including the shadowy figure who is now the patron of England (as well as of Germany and Portugal). If the saint existed at all, he was perhaps martyred in Palestine in the persecutions of Christians instigated by the Emperor Diocletian at the beginning of the 4th century. The popular legend in which the hero slays a dragon is a medieval Italian invention. He was for a long time a more important saint in the Orthodox Church than in the West, and the name was not much used in England during the Middle Ages, even after St George came to be regarded as the patron of England in the 14th century. Its use increased from the 1400s, and by 1500 it was regularly among the most popular male names. This popularity was reinforced when George I came to the throne in 1714 , bringing this name with him from Germany. It has been one of the most popular English boys' names ever since.

en.lifeSummary: When George Neville was born about 1418, in Ragnall, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, William de Neville, was 29 and his mother, Elizabeth Baker, was 25. He married Isabel Mabel Croftes about 1441, in Ragnall, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 2 daughters.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque George Neville est né environ 1418, à Ragnall, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William de Neville, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Baker, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Isabel Mabel Croftes environ 1441, à Ragnall, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 2 filles.

de.lifeSummary: Als George Neville um 1418 in Ragnall, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater William de Neville 29 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Baker 25. Er hat um 1441 in Ragnall, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom Isabel Mabel Croftes geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 2 Töchter.

it.lifeSummary: Quando George Neville è nato il circa 1418 nel Ragnall, Nottinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, William de Neville, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Baker, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Isabel Mabel Croftes circa 1441, nel Ragnall, Nottinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 2 figlie.

ko.lifeSummary: George Neville(이)가 대략 1418년 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 라그널에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William de Neville(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Baker(은)는 25세였다. 그는 대략 1441년 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 라그널에서 Isabel Mabel Croftes(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando George Neville nasceu aproximadamente 1418, em Ragnall, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William de Neville, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Baker, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Isabel Mabel Croftes aproximadamente 1441, em Ragnall, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 2 filhas.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда George Neville родился около 1418 г. в местности рагналл, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William de Neville было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Baker, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabel Mabel Croftes около 1441 г. в местности рагналл, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 2 дочери.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando George Neville nació aproximadamente 1418, en Ragnall, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, William de Neville, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Baker, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Isabel Mabel Croftes aproximadamente 1441, en Ragnall, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 2 hijas.
